UNSCENE

One outfit. Three lives. Zero compromise.

一件衣服。三种人生。零妥协。

Scroll
The Problem

你的早晨，
从一场战争开始。

西装。运动服。社交装。一天三套衣服。三个身份。三次"我是谁"的危机。Suit. Gym wear. Social outfit. Three sets of clothes a day. Three identities. Three "who am I" crises.

这不是生活方式。这是服装行业一百年来强加给你的暴政。他们把世界切成三块——商务、运动、社交——每一块都有自己的规则、自己的面料、自己的审美。你被要求在它们之间"切换"。换衣服。换心态。换自己。This isn't a lifestyle. It's a tyranny the clothing industry has imposed on you for a century. They sliced the world into three — business, sport, social — each with its own rules, its own fabrics, its own aesthetics. You're expected to "switch" between them. Change clothes. Change mindset. Change yourself.

但你的身体没有变。你还是你。你的早晨不应该花在"今天穿什么"上。你的精力应该花在更重要的事情上。But your body hasn't changed. You're still you. Your morning shouldn't be spent on "what should I wear today." Your energy belongs to more important things.

为什么你的衣服要逼你变成别人？Why should your clothes force you to become someone else?

08:00
挤进会议室，西装领带勒着脖子，衬衫黏在背上。空调房里刚凉下来，出地铁又是一身汗。
Squeezing into a meeting room, tie choking your neck, shirt sticking to your back. Just cooled down in the AC, then sweating again out of the subway.
盔甲 #1 / Armor #1
12:30
午休去健身房。在更衣室里挤着换衣服。速干T恤太随意，运动短裤太短。练完一身汗，还得换回西装。
Lunch break at the gym. Changing in a cramped locker room. Dri-fit tee too casual, shorts too short. Drenched in sweat, then back into the suit.
盔甲 #2 / Armor #2
19:00
约了朋友喝酒。运动装太邋遢，正装太拘谨。站在衣柜前第三次问自己：我到底要去哪？
Drinks with friends. Gym clothes too sloppy, formal wear too stiff. Standing before your wardrobe for the third time: where am I actually going?
盔甲 #3 / Armor #3

Your morning shouldn't start with "what should I wear today."

你的早晨不应该从"今天穿什么"开始。

Your wardrobe shouldn't be a place that demands decisions.

你的衣柜不应该是一个需要做决策的地方。

Your clothes shouldn't decide which scene you belong to.

你的衣服不应该替你决定你属于哪个场景。

A real man doesn't need three suits of armor to face a day.

一个真正的男人不需要三套盔甲来面对一天。

He needs clothes that make him forget he's wearing them.

他需要的是一件让他忘记自己穿着什么的衣服。

In the boardroom, it says "I'm ready."

在会议室里，它说"我准备好了"。

On the tennis court, it says "I won't be constrained."

在网球场上，它说"我不会被束缚"。

At the dinner party, it says "I belong here."

在晚宴上，它说"我属于这里"。

Same outfit. Same you.

同一件衣服。同一个你。

We don't design "multi-scene" clothing.

我们不设计"多场景"服装。

We design "no-scene" clothing.

我们设计"无场景"服装。

Because the best design is the one you don't feel.

因为最好的设计，是你感受不到的设计。

It doesn't demand attention. It doesn't define you. It simply lets you become you.

它不抢注意力。它不定义你。它只是让你，成为你。

UNSCENE

Design Philosophy

三条铁律。

我从Apple学到的。也是我要求UNSCENE做到的。What I learned from Apple. And what I demand from UNSCENE.

减法至上。

Saying No.

没有大Logo。没有多余口袋。没有"看起来很运动"的条纹。没有为了"功能性"而牺牲美感的接缝。每一处设计都必须通过这个测试：去掉它，产品还成立吗？如果成立，它就不该存在。No big logos. No extra pockets. No "looks sporty" stripes. No seams that sacrifice beauty for "functionality." Every design must pass this test: remove it, does the product still work? If yes, it shouldn't exist.

iPod had no power switch. Stopping was off. You don't need a button to "stop" — stopping is a state itself. UNSCENE doesn't need "occasion markers" — no occasion is its occasion.iPod没有开关。停下来就是关。不需要一个按钮来做"停止"这件事——停止本身就是一种状态。UNSCENE的衣服也不需要"场合标识"——无场合就是它的场合。

不需要解释。

It Just Works.

如果一件衣服需要解释"这也可以穿去开会"，设计就失败了。最好的设计是直觉性的。别人看到你穿它，不会问"这是什么场合穿的"——因为在任何场合它都理所当然。iPhone的滑动解锁不需要教程。UNSCENE的裤子也不需要说明书。If a piece of clothing needs explaining "this can also be worn to meetings," the design has failed. The best design is intuitive. People seeing you wear it won't ask "what occasion is this for" — because it's natural in any occasion. iPhone's slide-to-unlock needed no tutorial. UNSCENE pants need no manual.

The Macintosh mouse had one button. Not because two was impossible, but because one was enough. Every UNSCENE piece exists for one reason: to let you feel at ease anywhere.Macintosh的鼠标只有一个键。不是因为两个键做不出来，而是因为一个键就够了。UNSCENE的每件单品也只有一个理由存在：让你在任何地方都自在。

一句话说清楚。

One Sentence.

每一件产品都必须能用一句话说清楚它的价值。如果一句话说不清楚，回去重做。iPod不是"5GB硬盘+FireWire接口+超便携设计"，是"1000首歌装进口袋"。UNSCENE的第一条裤子："从早会到晚宴，你不需要换裤子。"Every product must be explainable in one sentence. If one sentence isn't enough, go back and redo it. iPod wasn't "5GB hard drive + FireWire + ultra-portable design." It was "1,000 songs in your pocket." UNSCENE's first pant: "From morning meeting to evening dinner, you don't need to change pants."

If a product launch needs more than one selling point, go back and find that one. That's the core. Everything else is noise.如果产品发布需要三个以上卖点，回去找一个。那一个才是核心。其他的都是噪音。

How We Speak

我们怎么说话。

UNSCENE的声音不是"品牌调性指南"。它是一种态度。确定性。反叛。类比驱动。不说废话。UNSCENE's voice isn't a "brand tone guide." It's an attitude. Certainty. Rebellion. Analogy-driven. No bullshit.

We Don't Say / 我们不说

"这件衣服可能适合很多场景""This might work for many occasions"

"采用四向弹力面料科技""Featuring four-way stretch fabric technology"

"兼具商务与休闲风格""Combining business and casual styles"

"我们致力于提供优质穿搭""We are committed to providing quality outfits"

We Say / 我们说

"这件衣服适合所有场景。""This works for every occasion."

"像第二层皮肤。在任何地方都自在。""Like a second skin. At ease anywhere."

"你不需要切换。""You don't need to switch."

"你的衣柜里有12条裤子但每天只穿同一条？不是你的问题。是裤子的问题。""12 pants in your wardrobe but you wear the same one every day? Not your problem. It's the pants' problem."

Product

不超过十个SKU。

不是因为你做不到更多。是因为你拒绝做不够好的。Not because you can't do more. Because you refuse to do anything less than great.

核心 / Essential 进阶 / Pro
上装 / Tops Tee / Polo / Shirt Jacket / Blazer
下装 / Bottoms Pant / Short Trouser / Active

价格带 / Price：600 — 1500元 / RMB

每一分钱都花在面料和工艺上。不花在营销上。Every yuan goes into fabric and craft. Not marketing.

First Product

第一款产品。

UNSCENE Pant
The One Pant
"From morning meeting to evening dinner, you don't need to change pants."
"从早会到晚宴，你不需要换裤子。"
Fabric
面料
四向弹力
抗皱透气
4-Way Stretch
Wrinkle-Free
Cut
剪裁
锥形裤腿
中腰设计
Tapered Leg
Mid-Rise
Details
细节
隐藏式口袋
无外露Logo
Hidden Pockets
No Visible Logo
Scenes
场景
会议室
网球场
酒吧
Boardroom
Court
Bar

一条裤子。三个场景。零妥协。如果你只能买一件UNSCENE的产品，就是它。One pant. Three scenes. Zero compromise. If you can only buy one UNSCENE piece, this is it.

"To free men from the tyranny of occasion."

让男人从场景的暴政中解放出来。

*If you wear clothes, you deserve to be free from switching.

*如果你穿衣服，你就值得不被切换。

One More Thing
One More Thing

先做一条裤子。

不是十条。不是一整个系列。一条。Not ten. Not a whole collection. One.

做到 insanely great。Make it insanely great.

然后让用户告诉你，下一步该做什么。Then let users tell you what to do next.

不要开线下店。不要请KOL。不要做品牌发布会。No retail stores. No KOLs. No brand launch event.

找50个真正的目标用户——创业者、建筑师、程序员——给他们每人一条裤子。让他们穿着它过真实的一天。拍下来。没有剧本。Find 50 real target users — founders, architects, programmers — give each one a pair of pants. Let them wear it through a real day. Film it. No script.

因为最好的营销，是产品本身在说话。Because the best marketing is the product speaking for itself.

Stay hungry. Stay foolish. Stay UNSCENE.

UNSCENE Brand Manifesto — Crafted from the Steve Jobs Perspective
